reports.name: Sales performance
reports.description: Revenue trend, top customers by volume, and invoice status breakdown — rolling 6 months.

reports.name: AR aging
reports.description: Accounts receivable split into aging buckets: current, 1–30, 31–60, 61–90, and 90+ days overdue.

reports.name: Inventory levels
reports.description: Stock on hand by item and warehouse, with reorder alerts for items below minimum level.

reports.name: Purchase & vendor spend
reports.description: PO volume and vendor spend breakdown for the last 6 months.

reports.name: Open sales orders
reports.description: Delivery backlog showing open sales orders, days late, and fulfillment priority.

reports.name: AP payment schedule
reports.description: Vendor invoices coming due in the next 7, 14, and 30 days, plus overdue items.

reports.name: Credit limit exposure
reports.description: Customers approaching or exceeding their credit limit, showing exposure (AR balance + open orders + open deliveries) vs. credit limit.

reports.name: Gross margin by customer
reports.description: Customer profitability analysis showing revenue, cost, gross profit, and margin % — with flags for customers below threshold.

reports.name: Quotation pipeline
reports.description: Open quotations not yet converted to orders, with age in days, expiry tracking, and total pipeline value.

reports.name: Returns & credit notes
reports.description: AR credit notes issued in the last 6 months, grouped by customer and month, with return trends and repeat offenders.

reports.name: Slow-moving inventory
reports.description: Items with stock on hand but zero or near-zero sales activity in the last 90+ days, showing tied-up capital and dead stock.
